groups.label: Civil Rights Movement Leaders
groups.explanation: Martin Luther King Jr., Rosa Parks, Malcolm X, and John Lewis were all leaders of the Civil Rights Movement.

groups.label: Abolitionist Movement Leaders
groups.explanation: Frederick Douglass, Harriet Tubman, William Lloyd Garrison, and Sojourner Truth were all leaders of the abolitionist movement.

groups.label: Women's Suffrage Leaders
groups.explanation: Susan B. Anthony, Elizabeth Cady Stanton, Alice Paul, and Lucretia Mott were all leaders of the women's suffrage movement.

groups.label: Progressive Era Figures
groups.explanation: Theodore Roosevelt, Woodrow Wilson, Upton Sinclair, and Jane Addams were all prominent figures of the Progressive Era.
